case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. BEATRIZ MUNGUIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GRACE M. GLENN FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNGUIA, BEATRIZ MUNGUIA LOPEZ, JULIO ALBERTO $6,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,250.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGUIA, BEATRIZ MUNGUIA LOPEZ, JULIO ALBERTO

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGUIA, BEATRIZ MUNGUIA LOPEZ, JULIO ALBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-11-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGUIA, BEATRIZ
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 09/03/2025. SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT GRACE M. GLENN APPEARING IN COURT. DEFENDANTS BEATRIZ MUNGUIA AND JULIO ALBERTO MUNGUIA LOPEZ ARE NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
